description: The European Council on Foreign Relations (ECFR) is a pan-European think tank focused on foreign and security policy, headquartered in Berlin. [Ellie Geranmayeh](/people/ellie-geranmayeh), a member of the [Iran Experts Initiative](/events/iei-email-leak-2023), served as deputy head of its Middle East and North Africa programme and senior policy fellow.
editorial_notes: Founded by Mark Leonard. Offices in Berlin, London, Madrid, Paris, Rome, Sofia, Warsaw.
